title: viola semilunaris
intro: Viola semilunaris, also known as the moon violet or half-moon violet, is a flowering plant species in the viola genus. It is native to Europe and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Viola semilunaris include treating respiratory issues such as coughs and colds, as well as relieving symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. Viola semilunaris can be prepared as an herbal infusion, tincture, or salve, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote relaxation and soothe skin irritations.
